title: Homepage loads hero section and core search controls
description: Verifies the homepage renders the hero content and the primary search controls are visible and usable.

steps.description: Verify element "Property type dropdown" is visible
Verify element "Smart search bar" is visible

title: Select property type from homepage dropdown
description: Verifies a user can open the property type dropdown and select a property type, and the selection is shown on the homepage.

steps.description: Verify element "Property type options list" is visible
Verify element "Property type dropdown" is visible

title: Select operation Venta from homepage dropdown
description: Verifies a user can select the Venta operation and the selection is displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "Operation options list" is visible

title: Select operation Alquiler from homepage dropdown
description: Verifies a user can select the Alquiler operation and the selection is displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "Operation options list" is visible

title: Smart search shows autocomplete suggestions for a valid query fragment
description: Verifies typing into the smart search bar displays autocomplete suggestions.

title: Search redirects to /search after selecting type, operation, and using smart search
description: Verifies the end-to-end homepage search workflow navigates to the search results page and shows the property grid.

steps.description: Verify element "Property results grid" is visible

title: Typing 1–2 characters does not show autocomplete suggestions
description: Verifies the autocomplete does not appear for very short input (1–2 characters).

steps.description: Verify element "Autocomplete suggestions" is not visible
Verify element "Autocomplete suggestions" is not visible

title: Short query search navigates to /search and shows empty state when no results
description: Verifies searching with a short input can navigate to /search and shows an empty state message when there are no matches.

steps.description: Verify text "No se encontraron resultados" is visible

title: Featured property cards render on homepage and can be opened
description: Verifies featured property cards are visible on the homepage and a user can open a property details page from a card (without validating card data correctness).

steps.description: Verify element "Featured properties section" is visible
Verify element "Featured property card" is visible
Verify element "Property details page content" is visible

title: Favorite toggle on a featured card changes visible state
description: Verifies a user can toggle the favorite control on a featured property card and see a visible state change.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured property card" is visible
Click on "Favorite toggle" on a featured property card
Verify element "Favorited state indicator" is visible
Click on "Favorite toggle" on the same featured property card
Verify element "Favorited state indicator" is not visible

title: Load search results and navigate to a property detail from the results grid
description: Verifies the /search page loads results with loading skeletons and allows navigating to a property detail via a PropertyCard.

steps.description: Verify element "property results grid" is visible
Click on a PropertyCard in the results grid
Verify element "property photo gallery" is visible

title: Location cascading dropdowns enforce selection order (department enables city, city enables neighborhood)
description: Verifies the cascading behavior of department → city → neighborhood filters on /search.

steps.description: Select a department from the department dropdown
Select a city from the city dropdown

title: Zero-results empty state appears when filters return no matches
description: Verifies the search shows an empty state message when filters produce zero results.

steps.description: Verify element "property results grid" is visible
Select filters that return zero matches (choose a very restrictive combination)

title: Clear all filters from empty state using "Limpiar" and verify results return
description: Verifies clicking "Limpiar" clears filters and reloads results after an empty state.

steps.description: Select filters that return zero matches (choose a very restrictive combination)
Verify element "property results grid" is visible
Verify element "empty state" is not visible

title: Save a configured search as a guest user
description: Verifies that clicking "Guardar Búsqueda" saves the current filter set and shows a visible confirmation message for a non-authenticated user.

steps.description: Select "Alquiler" from the operation filter dropdown
Select "Casa" from the property type filter dropdown
Select a bedroom count from the bedrooms filter control
Click "Guardar Búsqueda" to save current filters

title: Saved search persists and is visible on the Saved Searches page
description: Verifies a saved search created from /search is visible in /saved-searches.

steps.description: Select "Alquiler Temporal" from the operation filter dropdown
Select "Apartamento" from the property type filter dropdown
Click "Guardar Búsqueda" to save current filters
Click on the "Saved Searches" navigation link
Verify element "saved searches list" is visible

title: Clear filters after saving search and verify UI resets to default state
description: Verifies that after saving a search, clicking "Limpiar" resets filter selections and the grid remains functional.

steps.description: Select "Venta" from the operation filter dropdown
Select "Casa" from the property type filter dropdown
Click "Guardar Búsqueda" to save current filters
Verify element "property results grid" is visible

title: View property detail core information and amenities
description: Verifies a user can open a property detail page and see key info like price, specs, description, and amenities.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Verify element "property specs (area, bedrooms, bathrooms)" is visible
Scroll to the property description section
Verify element "amenities list with checkmarks" is visible

title: Navigate the photo gallery using arrows
description: Verifies the property photo gallery can be navigated using left/right arrows.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Click on the gallery next/right navigation arrow
Verify element "current gallery image" is visible
Click on the gallery previous/left navigation arrow
Verify element "current gallery image" is visible

title: Submit lead successfully from the contact form
description: Verifies a user can fill and submit the contact form and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Scroll to the contact form section
Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Hola, me interesa esta propiedad. ¿Podemos coordinar una visita?" into the message field

title: Contact form validation when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the contact form shows validation errors and does not show success when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Scroll to the contact form section
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the contact form rejects an invalid email address format.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Scroll to the contact form section
Type "Test User" into the name field
Type "Mensaje de prueba" into the message field

title: Toggle favorite on a property from the detail page
description: Verifies the user can toggle the favorite state from the property detail page UI.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Verify text "Saved" or "Added to favorites" is visible
Verify text "Saved" or "Added to favorites" is not visible

title: Invalid/nonexistent property ID shows friendly not found message
description: Verifies the property detail page shows a friendly not found message for an invalid ID.

steps.description: Click on the first property card in the results grid
Verify element "property detail content" is not visible

title: Publish a new property successfully through all wizard steps
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete the full 3-step wizard, publish the property, and see the success confirmation.

title: Complete details step inputs and proceed to review
description: Verifies a user can fill required details (price, currency, rooms, area, description) and advance to the review step.

title: Toggle promoted housing and select guarantees and amenities
description: Verifies a user can toggle vivienda promovida and choose guarantees and amenities on the details step without blocking progression.

title: Review step shows entered information before publishing
description: Verifies the review page is reachable and shows a visible review/summary section prior to publishing.

title: Publish from review and land on success confirmation
description: Verifies clicking "Publicar Ahora" publishes and navigates to the success page with a visible confirmation message.

title: Validation prevents advancing from step 1 when required location fields are missing
description: Verifies the wizard blocks progression to details if required address/location inputs are not provided.

title: Validation prevents advancing from details when price is missing or invalid
description: Verifies the details step shows a visible error and prevents going to review when price is empty or invalid.

title: Edit an owned property and save changes from review step
description: Verifies that an authenticated owner can open the edit wizard from My Properties, see pre-populated fields, change a field, and save updates to reach the success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Editar" on the first property in the list

title: Edit wizard loads with pre-populated data (Step 1)
description: Verifies that opening Edit from My Properties lands in the publish wizard and shows existing values already filled on the first step.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Editar" on the first property in the list

title: Edit wizard allows navigating through steps to Review
description: Verifies that an owner in edit mode can proceed through the wizard steps and reach the Review step where saving changes is available.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Editar" on the first property in the list
Click the "Siguiente" or "Continuar" button to go to the next step

title: Save changes from Review step and see success confirmation
description: Verifies that clicking "Guardar Cambios" on the review step completes update and shows the success page confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Editar" on the first property in the list
Click "Review" or "Revisar" to open the review step

title: After saving changes, return to My Properties and verify listing is still present
description: Verifies that after an edit save completes, the user can return to My Properties and still sees their listing in the list (not removed).

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Editar" on the first property in the list
Click "Review" or "Revisar" to open the review step

title: Delete an owned property and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies that an authenticated owner can delete a listing from My Properties, confirm deletion, and no longer see it in the list afterward.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Eliminar" on the first property in the list
Click "Confirmar" in the deletion confirmation dialog

title: Cancel deletion keeps the property in the list
description: Verifies that starting a delete from My Properties and cancelling does not remove the property and the list remains unchanged visually.

steps.description: Click on "My Properties" in the navigation menu
Click "Eliminar" on the first property in the list
Click "Cancelar" in the deletion confirmation dialog

title: Attempt to edit a non-owned property via edit link shows permission error or blocks editing
description: Verifies that when navigating to an edit wizard for a property not owned by the logged-in user, the UI blocks editing via an error message or redirect back to My Properties.

steps.description: Verify text "No tienes permiso" is visible

title: Guest can favorite a property from Search and see it in Favorites grid
description: Verifies a guest user can toggle a favorite from search results and the favorited property appears on the /favorites page.

steps.description: Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Verify element "Favorited heart icon" is visible on that same property card
Click on "Favorites" in the site navigation
Verify element "At least one property card in favorites" is visible

title: Guest can unfavorite a previously favorited property and it disappears from Favorites
description: Verifies a guest user can remove a favorite and the favorites list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Click on "Favorites" in the site navigation
Verify element "At least one property card in favorites" is visible
Click heart icon on the favorited property card in the favorites grid to toggle unfavorite
Verify element "Empty favorites state" is visible

title: Authenticated user can favorite from Search and see it in Favorites (cloud-synced)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can favorite a property and later see it listed in the favorites page.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the site navigation
Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Click on "Favorites" in the site navigation
Verify element "At least one property card in favorites" is visible

title: Favorite toggle is reflected consistently across Search and Favorites views
description: Verifies that toggling a favorite in one view is reflected when navigating to the other view in the same session.

steps.description: Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Verify element "Favorited heart icon" is visible on that same property card
Click on "Favorites" in the site navigation
Verify element "At least one property card in favorites" is visible
Click on "Search" in the site navigation
Verify element "Favorited heart icon" is visible on at least one property card

title: Guest favorites remain visible after leaving Search and going to Favorites
description: Verifies that guest favorites persist within the session and are still displayed when moving between pages.

steps.description: Verify element "Homepage property cards" is visible
Click heart icon on any property card to toggle favorite
Verify element "Favorited heart icon" is visible on that same property card
Click on "Favorites" in the site navigation
Verify element "At least one property card in favorites" is visible
